title: Mold Inspection Preparation Checklist
subtitle: Get your home ready for a professional mold inspection
description: Learn exactly what CMI-certified inspectors look for and how to prepare your home. This checklist helps you avoid costly delays and ensures inspectors can access all problem areas quickly.
bullets: Identify 6 high-risk zones inspectors prioritize in every assessment
Clear access points that inspectors need—or face $200+ re-visit fees
Document existing moisture issues before the CMI arrives
Prepare questions that uncover hidden mold your realtor missed

title: Mold Inspection Rate Guide 2026
subtitle: Know what certified mold inspectors charge in your area
description: Compare mold inspection costs across your region. See what CMI-certified inspectors typically charge, understand pricing factors, and learn how to budget for a professional assessment.
bullets: Regional price ranges for mold inspection services by state
What CMI-certified inspectors charge vs. non-certified alternatives
Breakdown of inspection costs: sampling, lab fees, and reports
Factors that affect pricing: home size, mold severity, remediation needs

title: Mold Inspector Vetting Guide
subtitle: Find a certified mold inspector you can trust
description: Learn what separates qualified mold inspectors from unlicensed contractors. This guide walks homeowners through credential verification, CMI certification, and red flags to avoid costly mistakes.
bullets: Verify CMI credentials and state licensing requirements
Spot inspectors who skip AIHA or NAHI certifications
Identify common inspection tactics that miss problems
Know fair pricing and inspection scope expectations
